message:
chore: Fix CLI compilation issues and add workspace deps

- Fix config_path.exists() bug in CLI (was using String instead of Path)
- Add clap to workspace dependencies
- Add toml and dirs to workspace dependencies
- Format CLI code with cargo fmt
- Sync beads tracking

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
